message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam databaseStyle cylinder
skinparam interfaceStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #483D8B
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 5
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantBorderDashed false
skinparam participantBorderDotted false
skinparam participantBorderDouble false
skinparam participantBorderGroove false
skinparam participantBorderInset false
skinparam participantBorderOutset false
skinparam participantBorderRidge false
skinparam participantBorderSolid true
skinparam participantBorderWidth 1
skinparam participantBorderColor #483D8B
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 5
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantBorderDashed false
skinparam participantBorderDotted false
skinparam participantBorderDouble false
skinparam participantBorderGroove false
skinparam participantBorderInset false
skinparam participantBorderOutset false
skinparam participantBorderRidge false
skinparam participantBorderSolid true
skinparam participantBorderWidth 1

actor Database as db
participant "ManageLogDemo" as demo
participant "ManageLogReceiveFacade" as receiveFacade
participant "ManageLogReceiveProvider" as receiveProvider
participant "ManageLogCommon" as common
participant "AnotherJavaProject" as anotherJava
participant "ManageLogUploadFacade" as uploadFacade
participant "AnotherProject" as anotherProject
participant "ManageLogQueryProvider" as queryProvider
participant "ManageLogQueryFacade" as queryFacade

== rpc 上传日志 ==
demo -> receiveFacade: aspect 获取数据
receiveFacade -> receiveProvider: rpc/http/kafka, 数据为业务数据, configName
receiveProvider -> common: 使用工具类
receiveProvider -> receiveProvider: 抓取配置
receiveProvider -> db: 落地数据

== 自主使用 facade 上传日志 ==
anotherJava -> receiveFacade: 自己组装数据, 使用 facade 提供的策略上传
receiveFacade -> receiveProvider: rpc/http/kafka, 数据为业务数据, configName
receiveProvider -> common: 使用工具类
receiveProvider -> receiveProvider: 抓取配置
receiveProvider -> db: 落地数据

== 自主上传日志 ==
anotherProject -> receiveProvider: http/kafka, 数据为业务数据, configName
receiveProvider -> common: 使用工具类
receiveProvider -> receiveProvider: 抓取配置
receiveProvider -> db: 落地数据

== 日志查询 ==
demo -> queryProvider: 获取数据
queryProvider -> queryFacade: rpc 提供
queryFacade -> anotherProject: http 提供 (默认)

@enduml
```
